parameters.jsCode:
// Build Consolidation Prompt — Final (includes L2 source breakdown)
const d = $input.item.json;

const totalMatches = (d.l1_name_matched_count || 0) + (d.l2_name_matched_count || 0) + (d.l3_name_matched_count || 0);

const l2SourceDetail = `(Facebook: ${d.l2_facebook_matches || 0} matches, News/Gazette: ${d.l2_news_matches || 0} matches, total: ${d.l2_name_matched_count || 0})`;

const prompt =
'You are an OSINT consolidation analyst for a government loan repayment enforcement agency (DTEF).\n\n' +
'CRITICAL RULE: You may only use data about the EXACT person named below. ' +
'If a source mentions a similar but different name, you MUST ignore that source entirely.\n\n' +
'TARGET PERSON:\n' +
'- Full Name: ' + d.Name + '\n' +
'- National ID (Omang): ' + (d.Omang || 'N/A') + '\n' +
'- Funded Degree: ' + (d.Degree || 'N/A') + '\n' +
'- Expected Profession: ' + (d.TargetProfession || 'Unknown') + '\n' +
'- Last Known Location: ' + d.LastKnownLocation + '\n\n' +
'SEARCH RESULTS FROM 3 LEVELS:\n\n' +
'SOURCE 1 — LinkedIn Profile (High Reliability, ' + (d.l1_name_matched_count || 0) + ' exact name matches):\n' +
(d.l1_snippet === 'NULL' ? 'No exact name matches found.' : d.l1_snippet) + '\n\n' +
'SOURCE 2 — Social/News/Corporate ' + l2SourceDetail + ':\n' +
'Results are tagged with [FACEBOOK], [NEWS/GAZETTE], [LINKEDIN-COMPANY], [JOBS] or [ZOOMINFO].\n' +
(d.l2_snippet === 'NULL' ? 'No exact name matches found.' : d.l2_snippet) + '\n\n' +
'SOURCE 3 — CIPA Company Registry (Direct, High Reliability, ' + (d.l3_name_matched_count || 0) + ' exact name matches):\n' +
(d.l3_snippet === 'NULL' ? 'No CIPA records found for this person.' : d.l3_snippet) +
(d.l3_cipa_results && d.l3_cipa_results.length > 0 ? '\nCIPA STRUCTURED DATA: ' + JSON.stringify(d.l3_cipa_results) : '') + '\n\n' +
'MATCHING RULES:\n' +
'- Accept ONLY results where "' + d.Name + '" appears as a CHARACTER-FOR-CHARACTER exact match.\n' +
'- [FACEBOOK] tags from corporate pages announcing staff are HIGH VALUE — treat employer name from these as reliable.\n' +
'- [NEWS/GAZETTE] tags are HIGH VALUE for government appointments and promotions.\n' +
'- Do NOT confirm near-matches, partial surnames, or abbreviated names.\n' +
'- Total pre-filtered exact matches across all sources: ' + totalMatches + '\n\n' +
'CONFIDENCE GUIDE:\n' +
'- HIGH: 2+ sources agree on same employer, OR 1 high-reliability source (CIPA/gazette/corporate Facebook).\n' +
'- MEDIUM: 1 medium-reliability source (personal Facebook, LinkedIn company page).\n' +
'- LOW: Data is ambiguous or contradicts itself.\n' +
'- NONE: Zero exact name matches found.\n\n' +
'Return ONLY a raw JSON object (no markdown, no code fences) with these exact keys:\n' +
'{\n' +
'  "best_employer": "Most likely current employer, or Unknown",\n' +
'  "best_title": "Job title if found, or Unknown",\n' +
'  "confidence": "HIGH | MEDIUM | LOW | NONE",\n' +
'  "location": "Current city/area if found, or ' + d.LastKnownLocation + '",\n' +
'  "sources_matched": <number 0-3>,\n' +
'  "best_source": "Which source gave the strongest signal",\n' +
'  "reasoning": "2-3 sentence explanation citing which sources agreed",\n' +
'  "drift_warning": <true if any source might be a different person>,\n' +
'  "action_required": <true if human follow-up is needed>,\n' +
'  "name_found_in_sources": ["exact name strings that matched"]\n' +
'}';

return [{ json: { ...d, consolidation_prompt: prompt, total_matches: totalMatches } }];
